name: moshwar-taxi
description: Your Journey With Us - Mauritanian Taxi App

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:driver" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:customer && npm run build:driver && npm run build:admin
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/shared && npm install && cd ../../apps/customer && npm install && cd ../driver && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
